arts.ttl: Tom Cannon's place in 13-man Stoke City hall of fame thanks to four-goal magic
arts.sum: Jimmy had scored another 14 goals the following season before moving on to Everton – via, incredibly, a few months playing for Sittingbourne and as player-coach Barcelona. He became the first player to score four in one league game for Stoke when he took Palace apart.
